mainEntity.name: Forklift certification required for comp claim in Midvale UT?
mainEntity.text: Forklift certification required for comp claim in Midvale UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: No—OSHA training helps prove employer fault but not claim eligibility.

suggestedAnswer.text: Uncertified ops common Midvale; use to leverage third-party safety suit.
